officials.name: C. W. T. Johnson
officials.position: 1st Class Clerk and Clerk to Executive and Legislative Councils

officials.name: W. H. Brabant
officials.position: Comptroller of Customs and President, Fiji Marine Board

officials.name: W. W. Savage
officials.position: Chief Clerk and Secretary, Fiji Marine Board

officials.name: P. L. Collison
officials.allowances: receives 50l. from Western Pacific High Commission Funds.

officials.name: Charles A. Holmes
officials.position: Commissioner of Lands (also Crown Surveyor, Conservator of Forests and Chairman Mining Board)

officials.name: B. M. Wilson
officials.allowances: with quarters and horse allowance. Receives also 150l. as Officer in charge of Medical School.

officials.name: V. Abrahams
officials.position: Sanitary Inspector, Central Board of Health

officials.name: Savenaca Viekosu
officials.allowances: by 5l. to 75l., with quarters and rations.

officials.name: G. R. Anderson
officials.allowances: receives also personal allowance 25l., with quarters.

officials.name: M. S. Buksh
officials.position: 2nd Class Clerk and Hindustani and Tamil Interpreter

officials.name: W. Miller Caldwell
officials.position: 3rd Class Clerk and Hindustani and Tamil Interpreter
